sources.name: Iconic Evidence Completion
sources.summary: Titles required by the Critical Consensus or World Video Game Hall of Fame evidence sets that were absent from the broad retro catalogues.
sources.distribution_policy: Metadata and artwork only; the user imports or installs an owned copy.

entries.title: A Mind Forever Voyaging
entries.description: Included because it is recognized by Critical Consensus. Import your owned DOS installation, archive, or DOSBox launch descriptor.
